message:
feat(a11y): implement Accessible trait for 5 core widgets (#44)

Phase 2 of the accessibility initiative: widget-level Accessible
trait adoption. The Phase 1 infrastructure (A11yTree, A11yTreeBuilder,
A11yNodeInfo, A11yRole, A11yState, A11yTreeDiff) was already complete
in ftui-a11y. This wires it into the widget layer.

Widgets implementing Accessible:
- TextInput: role=TextInput, exposes value/placeholder/focus/mask state
- List: role=List with ListItem children, exposes block title and item text
- Table: role=Table, exposes block title, row/column counts
- Tabs: role=Group with Tab children, exposes tab titles
- ProgressBar: role=ProgressBar, exposes ratio/label/value_text

Supporting changes:
- Add ftui-a11y dependency to ftui-widgets
- Add a11y_node_id(Rect) -> u64 using FNV-1a for deterministic IDs
- Add Block::title_text() accessor for accessible names
- Re-export Accessible trait from ftui-widgets

All 3007 pre-existing tests pass, zero regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,8 @@ repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
 homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
 documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-widgets"
 readme = "../../README.md"
+keywords = ["tui", "terminal", "ui", "ftui", "frankentui"]
+categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 
 [features]
 default = []
@@ -19,6 +21,7 @@ tracing = ["dep:tracing", "ftui-render/tracing"]
 [dependencies]
 ahash = "0.8"
 bitflags = "2.11.0"
+ftui-a11y = { path = "../ftui-a11y", version = "0.1.0" }
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.1" }
 ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout", version = "0.2.1" }
 ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.2.1" }
